name: sdd-autopilot
description: SDD lite-chain auto-run meta-skill. Use when the user says "sdd-autopilot", "autopilot", "자동 구현", "end-to-end 구현", "자동으로 구현해줘", or wants automated end-to-end implementation from requirements to spec sync via the lite chain (draft → gates → implementation → spec sync) without approval steps.
